story.soThat: develop branch merge'de otomatik deploy olsun
story.tasks:
Task 1: Create staging CD workflow file (AC: #1, #2) - Subtask 1.1: Create .github/workflows/cd-staging.yml - Subtask 1.2: Configure push to develop branch trigger - Subtask 1.3: Setup Node.js 20 environment
Task 2: Configure build job (AC: #3 - build) - Subtask 2.1: Docker image build - Subtask 2.2: Tag with staging-{commit-sha} - Subtask 2.3: Push to container registry - Subtask 2.4: Login to registry using DOCKER_USERNAME/PASSWORD
Task 3: Configure deploy job (AC: #3 - deploy) - Subtask 3.1: SSH or cloud deployment to staging - Subtask 3.2: Pull new Docker image - Subtask 3.3: Run database migrations (npx prisma migrate deploy) - Subtask 3.4: Health check (curl http://localhost:3000/health) - Subtask 3.5: Rollback on failure (previous image tag)
Task 4: Environment and secrets configuration (AC: #4, #5) - Subtask 4.1: Configure GitHub Environment (staging) - Subtask 4.2: Setup DOCKER_USERNAME secret - Subtask 4.3: Setup DOCKER_PASSWORD secret - Subtask 4.4: Setup STAGING_SERVER_HOST secret

story-context.acceptanceCriteria: 1. .github/workflows/cd-staging.yml oluşturulmuş 2. Trigger: push to develop branch 3. Jobs: - build: Docker image build, Tag: staging-{sha}, Push to container registry - deploy: Deploy to staging environment, Run database migrations (prisma migrate deploy), Health check (curl /health), Rollback on failure 4. Environment: staging (GitHub Environments) 5. Secrets: DOCKER_USERNAME, DOCKER_PASSWORD, STAGING_SERVER_HOST

doc.title: Epic 11: CI/CD & Deployment
doc.snippet: As a developer, I want staging'e automated deployment, So that develop branch merge'de otomatik deploy olsun. Acceptance Criteria: .github/workflows/cd-staging.yml oluşturulmuş, Trigger: push to develop branch, Jobs: build and deploy with health checks.

doc.title: Epic Technical Specification: CI/CD & Deployment
doc.snippet: CD Pipeline Workflow (Staging): Merge to develop branch → GitHub Actions Trigger (cd-staging) → Build Docker Image → Tag: staging-{commit-sha} → Push to Container Registry → Deploy to Staging Environment → Run Database Migrations → Health Check Validation.

doc.title: Epic Technical Specification: CI/CD & Deployment
doc.snippet: Database Migration Contract: Migration command "npx prisma migrate deploy", environment: staging or production, rollbackCommand: "npx prisma migrate reset", success criteria: schemaUpdated, healthCheckPass, applicationResponsive.

doc.title: Deployment Architecture
doc.snippet: GitHub Actions (ci.yml) and Deployment (cd-production.yml) patterns. Docker image build and push, Deploy to production, Run migrations, Health check validation.

doc.title: Story 11.2: CI Pipeline (GitHub Actions)
doc.snippet: CI Pipeline Pattern: GitHub Actions workflow for continuous integration, Automated testing on every pull request, Quality gate enforcement before merge, Parallel test execution for efficiency.

doc.title: Story 11.1: Production Dockerfile (Multi-Stage)
doc.snippet: Multi-stage Dockerfile: Stage 1 (dependencies), Stage 2 (build), Stage 3 (production). Base: node:20-alpine, non-root user, health check configuration.

doc.title: Epic Technical Specification: Testing Infrastructure
doc.snippet: Testing Strategy: Unit tests, Integration tests, E2E tests. Health check endpoints for deployment validation. Test scripts: npm run test, npm run test:integration, npm run test:e2e.

file.reason: Reference implementation for GitHub Actions workflow structure, Node.js 20 setup, npm ci, build process with npm run build and npx prisma generate
Production Dockerfile with 3-stage build (deps, build, production). Base: node:20-alpine, npm ci, npm run build, npx prisma generate, health check configuration
Build scripts: npm run build, test commands, docker scripts. Production build: "build": "nest build", Prisma: "prisma:deploy": "prisma migrate deploy"

constraints.constraint: Node.js 20.x LTS runtime - All workflows must use Node.js 20 (consistent with CI, Dockerfile, production)
Docker multi-stage build - Use 3-stage Dockerfile (deps → build → production) with node:20-alpine base
Non-root user - Docker containers must run as nestjs:1001 (security best practice)
Health check validation - Post-deployment health check to /health endpoint required (Epic 7)
Prisma migration - Database migrations via npx prisma migrate deploy (must run before app deployment)
Environment variables - Use GitHub Secrets for DOCKER_USERNAME, DOCKER_PASSWORD, STAGING_SERVER_HOST
GitHub Environments - Use staging environment for deployment isolation and protection
Image tagging - Staging images tagged as staging-{commit-sha} (unique identification)
Rollback on failure - Automatic rollback to previous image tag if deployment fails
CI/CD consistency - Build process must match CI pipeline: npm ci → npm run build → npx prisma generate

api.name: Database Health Check
api.description: Database connectivity check - returns connection status and response time

tests.standards: Jest testing framework with three test levels: 1) Unit tests: jest (individual services/modules), 2) Integration tests: jest --testPathPattern=integration (API endpoints, database), 3) E2E tests: jest --config ./test/jest-e2e.json (complete workflows). CI/CD pipeline validates all tests before deployment. Test coverage threshold: 70% (enforced in CI).

test.idea: CD Pipeline Workflow Test - Create test workflow file and verify trigger configuration: push to develop branch triggers workflow execution
Docker Build Test - Verify Docker image builds successfully with multi-stage Dockerfile and tags correctly as staging-{commit-sha}
Deployment Test - Verify application deploys to staging environment, starts successfully, and responds to health checks
Migration Test - Verify npx prisma migrate deploy executes successfully and database schema is updated
Health Check Test - Verify /health endpoint returns 200 OK after deployment with {status: "ok", timestamp}
Rollback Test - Simulate deployment failure and verify automatic rollback to previous image tag works correctly
